substep.title: Evaluate Five Criteria
substep.action:
Check each criterion against accumulated bundle state:
1. **Problem clearly scoped** — restatement matches grilled scope; in-scope AND out-of-scope explicit 2. **Current state factually mapped** — research findings cover every relevant code area; no "we don't know if X exists" on critical questions 3. **Impact understood** — downstream artifacts implied are identified at high level; risk areas surfaced 4. **Edge cases identified** — relevant per primary tag (deletion, error states, permissions, concurrency) 5. **Agent can articulate unprompted** — can walk through scope + current state + design implications + risks + edge cases from the bundle alone
Record PASS/NOT YET + one-line evidence per criterion.

check.action: Proceed to step 6c (confirm exit with user).
Proceed to step 6d (surface gap and loop).

substep.title: Confirm Exit With User

check.action: Capture gap as next turn's focus. Loop back to step 2.
Exit. Bundle on disk is the handoff state.

substep.title: Surface Gap and Loop

check.action: Capture next turn focus. Loop back to step 2.
Note force-exit in research file (which criteria unmet). Proceed to substep 6e.
Exit. Bundle on disk is the handoff state.

substep.title: Handoff to code-design
